title: Jellyflow Conformance Schema Runner Split v1
problem: runtime::conformance has a module facade, but scenario.rs still mixes suite/scenario builders, setup, action vocabulary, trace vocabulary, and callback event vocabulary, while runner.rs mixes suite iteration, action execution, store tracing, callback tracing, and graph-op serialization. Jellyflow needs the same public API and fixture schema with clearer private ownership before richer gesture families expand the harness.

evidence.summary: Opened the conformance schema/runner split workstream with ADR 0003 renderer-free constraints.
Split conformance scenario schema into constants, suite, setup, action, and trace submodules without public API or fixture schema changes.
Split conformance runner internals into actions, trace, and callbacks submodules without behavior changes.
Verified formatting, conformance, example harness, public-surface, package, clippy, JSON, and diff gates; closed the lane.

continue_policy.notes: Workstream closed after the behavior-preserving private conformance scenario/runner split. Open a new workstream for new gesture actions, renderer smoke tests, adapter templates, or fixture schema version changes.
